programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E26
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E26

programme.title: Munsters 231
programme.desc: Munsters 231

programme.title: Addams Family 114
programme.desc: Addams Family 114

programme.title: Love Boat 113
programme.desc: Love Boat 113

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Nicky Sebastian the son of an old neighbor comes to Wameru to ask Tracy to sell him back a strip of land that had belonged to his father Tracy tells him the land is needed as a buffer zone between the preserve and the neighboring cattle ranches But Nicky actually intends to use the land as a hunting zone and to start things in motion lets a truckload of cattle loose into the area hoping to create just the situation Tracy most fears

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts look forward to lunch with Jennifers friend Marcie and her new spouse Adam Fowler who vanishes and is soon found dead Meanwhile two men who followed him out of the restaurant trail who they think is his wife Jennifer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: After witnessing a stabbing Chris becomes the target of the prepetrator who has a history of making witnesses disappear Meanwhile the NYPD brass demand stress reduction classes for the 14th Precinct

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Cocaine kingpin Stryker targets Starsky and Hutch after a million dollars in coke goes missing Dobey gives the duo 48 hours to crack the case before turning it over to Internal Affairs

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke must pick up the Janics alone and without Airwolf when theyre ambushed Dom and Kaitlen use Airwolf to save the laser secrets

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A prisoner acquires a jacket that renders him invisible allowing him to walk out of jail and get revenge on those who betrayed him

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 33 Fractured Fairy Tales Sleeping Beauty Peabodys Improbably History William Tecumseh Sherman Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 34

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Steve spends time individually with Billie Jo Bobbie Jo and Betty Jo doing their favorite activities As such each girl believes that Steve has chosen her as his girl At least one - who has been doodling the name BJ Elliott - if not more is even expecting Steve to marry her imminently

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Since she is now in junior college Bobbie Jo thinks shes all grown up and as a grown up she can make her own decisions The latest decision that shes made is to go to an all night party with her friends - the evening is to start with a dance in the school gym lasting until midnight followed by the all night party at the country club

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A gorgeous but deadly dancer who manipulates men easily and kills for kicks succeeds in drawing Nick into her dangerous web

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer has unforeseen complications when pursued by a determined motorcycle cop in a barren desert

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A known pornographer being investigated by Nick kills Nicks snitch when he finds a wire on him Will Nick have to commit perjury to convict him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13 Gen Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col Hogan falls for the bait As a result Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An assertive Gen Burkhalter requisitions the famous Édouard Manet painting The Fife Player from the Louvre museum in Paris to give to Hermann Goering as a birthday present Undaunted by seemingly impossible logistics Hogan and LeBeau decide to steal it back

programme.title: Mchale 230
programme.desc: Mchale 230

programme.title: Mchale 229
programme.desc: Mchale 229

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in war games against a rival unit and Pvt Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George gets into a dustup with Grampa over a used vacuum cleaner which George wants to give to Kate as a gift

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Pepino feels his job is threatened when Grampa takes on another hired hand

programme.title: Smart 520
programme.desc: Smart 520

programme.title: Smart 517
programme.desc: Smart 517

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends a woman who is suspected of being a witch by the people from the town in which she lives They have to deal with a plot to get rid of her that is hatched by the supersticious locals

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Suzanne doesnt know if boyfriend Alan loves her for her self or her money Mason falls for Alicia but her terrier doesnt like him Isaac falls for Selena who is engaged to someone else

programme.title: WKRP 210
programme.desc: WKRP 210

programme.title: WKRP 215
programme.desc: WKRP 215

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman Harlan and Freida accompany Wood and young son Will on a father-son camping trip

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Evan knocks a hole in a spare bedroom and it looks like Abe Lincoln

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dan comes looking for Roth and finds a man named Rodmore in charge So Dan tries to find Roth to find out whats going on but he appears to have vanished So he tries to find out why Roth turned control of the company to Rodmore At the same time someone is following Dan

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer and Jonathan go undercover to identify a toy plan thief who has become a murderer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: While Kirk goes in for surgery Larry Darryl and Darryl mind the Minuteman Café

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick George and Kirk embark on a trip to Boston to attend a Celtics game meanwhile Joanna and Leslie prepare for the arrival of a celebrity at the Inn

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Garner and Ryan investigate a family dispute which results in a wife accusing her husband of corporate embezzlement and giving him the reason to erase her The detectives have to find the man before he can carry out his plan

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The arrival of the Alphans on another planet seems to cause a change in its atmosphere setting off pollution and poisoning of the water They meet Zoran the sole survivor of the last exploratory force who tells them that the planet is controlled by an immortal being - with whom Koenig must parley if he and his crew are to leave the planet alive

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renees brother has PTSD In a desperate effort to help him she agrees to let him undergo special treatment The treatment removes his emotion The project is overseen by Sandoval and the emotion they take is given to Daan

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison is kidnapped by a unique modern artist named Quinn whos actually one of the aliens being hunted by his kind Hes mysteriously immune to Earths bacteria so the other aliens want to learn his secret through dissection Quinn wants to set up a dialogue with Earths leaders to arrange a peaceful takeover of the planet as opposed to an all-out slaughter of humanity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane experiments with artificial earthquakes

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath arrives in a dying desert town only to find himself a visitor in a madhouse His hosts are five deranged people who play bizarre and deadly games with their infrequent guests Heaths role in their hellish fantasy the accused--on trial for rape and murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A fortune in diamonds awaits anyone who gets to it first Murder and arson are just some of the ways of keeping some from succeeding A stranger follows Cheyenne and the treasure hunting party but is he all they have to worry about

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Belzig head of a bank in East Berlin tricks unwary people anxious to escape to the West that he can help them Instead he steals their money and kills them Hes amassing a fortune to launch a new Nazi movement The mission for the IM force is to put him out of business

programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: CJ Hollett is a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Black Belt who loves teaching his craft. He is very well respected as an MMA coach for his technical mindset, high level skills and experience coaching UFC fighters. CJ loves working with MMA fighters because of their hunger to win, and believes it's time for Jiu Jitsu to make a resurgence in the MMA cage.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol
